name: button-group
visual_summary: A group of buttons that can be used to present multiple options or actions to the user. It is typically used when multiple buttons need to be placed together and grouped under a common header or description. A developer would use this when building a navigation menu, settings panel or action list.
generation_prompt:

Name: button-group
Description: A group of buttons that can be used to present multiple options or actions to the user. It is typically used when multiple buttons need to be placed together and grouped under a common header or description. A developer would use this when building a navigation menu, settings panel or action list.
Style: none
Interactions: clickable
Tags: button, group

- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
